content.name: Blockades
content.description: Adds a Blockade default behavior. Ships hold a hemisphere formation on the hostile side of a target gate and engage transiting hostiles. AI factions at war auto-blockade enemy-facing gates in their claimspace.
content.author: IllustrisJack

text.name: Blockades
text.description: Adds a Blockade default behavior. Ships hold formation around a target gate and engage hostiles.
text.author: IllustrisJack
